skills.name: Stamina Surge
skills.description: Speeds up stamina recovery.

levels.description: Stamina recovery speed +10%
Stamina recovery speed +20%
Stamina recovery speed +30%

skills.name: Master Mounter
skills.description: Makes it easier to mount monsters.

levels.description: Makes it easier to mount monsters and down mounted monsters.

skills.name: Artillery
skills.description: Strengthens explosive attacks like gunlance shells, Wyvern's Fire, charge blade phial attacks, and sticky ammo.

levels.description: Increases power of each attack by 10% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 15%.
Increases power of each attack by 20% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 30%.
Increases power of each attack by 30% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 50%.
Increases power of each attack by 40% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 60%.
Increases power of each attack by 50% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 70%.

skills.name: Divine Blessing
skills.description: Has a predetermined chance of reducing the damage you take.

levels.description: While active, reduces damage taken by 15%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 30%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 50%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 60%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 60%. Skill becomes easier to activate as well.

skills.name: Windproof
skills.description: Grants protection against wind pressure.

levels.description: Slightly reduces the effects of minor wind pressure.
Reduces the effects of minor wind pressure.
Negates minor wind pressure.
Negates minor wind pressure and reduces the effects of major wind pressure.
Negates minor and major wind pressure.
